targets.query:
SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen"
WHERE (("technology" = 'Hydro Run-of-river and poundage' OR "technology" = 'Hydro Water Reservoir') AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) 
ORDER BY time DESC
SELECT mean("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE ("technology" = 'Biomass' AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE (("technology" = 'Fossil Gas' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Coal-derived gas') AND "country" =~ /^$state$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC
SELECT mean("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE ("technology" = 'Oil' AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen" WHERE (("technology" = 'Fossil Coal-derived gas' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Oil shale' OR "technology" = 'Waste' OR "technology" = 'Other' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Peat') AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) 
ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Total capacity")  / 4 FROM "Capacities" WHERE ("simulationID" =~ /^$Scenario$/ AND "technology" = 'Renewable' AND "UnitName" = 'Solar [MW]') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "technology", "UnitName" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen" 
WHERE (("technology" = 'Other renewable' OR "technology" = 'Geothermal' OR "technology" = 'Marine') AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) 
ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen"
WHERE ("technology" = 'Hydro Pumped Storage' AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter AND "Generation [MW]" >= 0
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null)
ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen"
WHERE ("technology" = 'Hydro Pumped Storage' AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter AND "Generation [MW]" < 0
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null)
ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen_balanced"
WHERE (("technology" = 'Hydro Run-of-river and poundage' OR "technology" = 'Hydro Water Reservoir') AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) 
ORDER BY time DESC
SELECT mean("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE ("technology" = 'Biomass' AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE (("technology" = 'Fossil Gas' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Coal-derived gas') AND "country" =~ /^$state$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC
SELECT mean("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE ("technology" = 'Oil' AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen_balanced" 
WHERE (("technology" = 'Fossil Coal-derived gas' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Oil shale' OR "technology" = 'Waste' OR "technology" = 'Other' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Peat') AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) 
ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Total capacity")  / 4 FROM "Capacities" WHERE ("simulationID" =~ /^$Scenario$/ AND "technology" = 'Renewable' AND "UnitName" = 'Solar [MW]') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "technology", "UnitName" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen_balanced" 
WHERE (("technology" = 'Other renewable' OR "technology" = 'Geothermal' OR "technology" = 'Marine') AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter 
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) 
ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen_balanced"
WHERE ("technology" = 'Hydro Pumped Storage' AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter AND "Generation [MW]" >= 0
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null)
ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]")
FROM "per_type_gen_balanced"
WHERE ("technology" = 'Hydro Pumped Storage' AND "country" =~ /^$country$/) AND $timeFilter AND "Generation [MW]" < 0
GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null)
ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Reg_generation" WHERE (("technology" = 'Other renewable' OR "technology" = 'Geothermal' OR "technology" = 'Marine') AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode"='api_version') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC
SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE ("technology" = 'Biomass' AND "country" =~ /^$state$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE (("technology" = 'Fossil Gas' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Coal-derived gas') AND "country" =~ /^$state$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Per_type_gen" WHERE (("technology" = 'Fossil Gas' OR "technology" = 'Fossil Coal-derived gas') AND "country" =~ /^$state$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "country" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]") FROM "reg_generation" WHERE (("technology" = 'Other' OR "technology" = 'Waste') AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode" =~ /^$mode$/ AND "balanced" = 'no') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "reg_generation" WHERE ("technology" = 'Wind Onshore' AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode" =~ /^$mode$/ AND "balanced" = 'no') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Total capacity")  / 4 FROM "Capacities" WHERE ("simulationID" =~ /^$Scenario$/ AND "technology" = 'Renewable' AND "UnitName" = 'Solar [MW]') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "technology", "UnitName" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT sum("Generation [MW]") FROM "Reg_generation" WHERE (("technology" = 'Other renewable' OR "technology" = 'Geothermal' OR "technology" = 'Marine') AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode"='api_version') AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]") FROM "reg_generation" WHERE ("technology" = 'Hydro Pumped Storage' AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode" =~ /^$mode$/ AND "balanced" = 'no' AND "Generation [MW]" < 0) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

SELECT mean("Generation [MW]") FROM "reg_generation" WHERE ("technology" = 'Hydro Pumped Storage' AND "state" =~ /^$state$/ AND "mode" =~ /^$mode$/ AND "balanced" = 'no' AND "Generation [MW]" >= 0) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h), "state" fill(null) ORDER BY time DESC

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "state" WHERE value != 'Common'
list.name: state
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES WITH KEY = "state" WHERE value != 'Common'
